vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

requirements: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window
Wing spar carrying nacelle loads into fuselage spine
V-tail/ruddervator and landing gear attach structure
Maritime surveillance, salt-fog resistant, flotation-equipped landing gear
Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

verify.rule: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
The mass estimate is within the acceptable range and is a numeric value.
All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
Each interface has a reciprocal joint family declared by the neighboring subsystem.
Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
Boundary conditions are specified with fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion issues in CFRP material under extreme temperature conditions.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks and improved insulation.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress through the belly camera window during maritime operations.
risk.mit: Use waterproof seals and gaskets around the camera window.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance for moving parts, leading to jamming or failure.
risk.mit: Ensure all critical interfaces have sufficient clearance and fit language.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to overloading of the wing spar socket.
risk.mit: Conduct load testing and stress analysis to ensure the socket can handle the expected loads.

risk.desc: Risk of corrosion in aluminum components due to salt-fog exposure.
risk.mit: Apply corrosion-resistant coatings or use alternative materials.

verify.value: All required fields are present in the subsystem plan.
verify.rule: The output must include all required fields as per the schema.

verify.value: Mass estimate is not provided.
verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: [p0_feature_mapping] good: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: Adjacent interfaces include fit_class and stack_up_mm.
verify.rule: [interface_fit_class] good: Adjacent interfaces include fit_class (H7/h6, LC2) and stack_up_mm.

verify.value: No visible evidence of fastener locking or preload.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Geometry_ops args.at [x,y,z] are distributed across the subsystem volume.
verify.rule: [coordinate_distribution] good: Most geometry_ops include args.at coordinates distributed across the local subsystem volume.

verify.value: Dimensions match tiltrotor scale and are physically plausible.
verify.rule: [dimensional_realism] good: Dimensions match tiltrotor scale: 200-1500mm wingspan, 50-300mm fuselage dia. Wall thickness, hole diameters, fillet radii are physically plausible.

verify.value: cad_brief includes ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step.
verify.rule: [assembly_sequence_defined] good: cad_brief includes ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step.

verify.value: Uses seed-characteristic ops: chamfer, pocket, drill, subtract. Subtractive features and finishing features are present.
verify.rule: [expected_op_variety] good: Uses seed-characteristic ops: chamfer, pocket, drill, subtract. Subtractive features (drill/pocket/channel) and finishing (fillet/chamfer) both present.

verify.value: Boundary_conditions object includes fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.
verify.rule: verify must include a boundary_conditions object with fixture_points (list of {at:[x,y,z], type:fixed|pinned|roller}), thermal_zones (list of {at:[x,y,z], W_or_degC:number, role:source|sink}), and pressure_faces (list of {face:string, Pa:number}).

risk.desc: Mass estimate is not provided, which may affect weight distribution and structural integrity.
risk.mit: Include a mass estimate in the cad_brief to ensure proper weight distribution and structural integrity.

risk.desc: No visible evidence of fastener locking or preload, which may lead to joint failure.
risk.mit: Add visible evidence of fastener locking or preload to critical joints.
